name: visual-summary-ext
description: Chrome extension that visually summarizes webpage content as interactive Mermaid flowcharts

scripts.build: npm run build:content && npm run build:main
scripts.dev: npm run build && chokidar 'src/**/*' 'popup.html' 'manifest.json' -c 'npm run build' --initial false
scripts.dev:simple: npm run build:main -- --watch & npm run build:content -- --watch
